problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: If Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
